programme.title: The Evil Twin
programme.desc: A woman escapes from an abusive relationship by moving back to her hometown, only to discover she has a long-lost twin sister who may be a murderer.

programme.title: My Husband's Killer Girlfriend
programme.desc: A mother discovers that the nanny who framed her for abandoning her 3-year-old daughter is her ex-husband's new girlfriend. Forced to go on the run to prove her innocence and protect her child, she learns that the woman is a psychopath.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry helps Bobbi's self-defense class; Lisa's lunch causes an uproar; Leung receives some mysterious packages.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry uses his interview at a rival school to try to get the phys-ed job; Robert believes an elaborate musical number will prove he has what it takes.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry gets a chance to coach the varsity basketball team; Trudy gives Lisa a controversial gift; Dwyer suffers a bad day.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: The staff is in rough shape at the morning assembly; the new librarian is revealed.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Jack joins the robotics club to Dre's dismay; Ruby helps Diane with her school project.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre spirals when Rainbow is elected to the prestigious California Board of Medicine, and the invitation for the annual fundraising gala is addressed to Dr. Rainbow Johnson and guest; Diane redecorates her room to impress Mason.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy and Kyle decide to have a home birth -- at Mike and Vanessa's; Ryan and Chuck team up to construct a state-of-the-art crib.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: While Mike is away, Kristin learns what it takes to be in charge at Outdoor Man; Vanessa and Kyle debate how to upgrade the backyard play area and Ryan teaches Mandy how to play chess, but he may be the one getting schooled.

programme.title: 8 Simple Rules
programme.desc: Paul discovers he has a lot in common with his new editor (Patrick Warburton); Paul forbids the girls inviting their boyfriends to Thanksgiving Day dinner.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to guide his eldest daughter through a momentous occasion when Andi is unavailable; Andi gets stuck in traffic while trying to take Emme and Teddy to the zoo.

programme.title: Life in Pieces
programme.desc: Tim and Heather accidentally make things awkward when Tyler introduces his new girlfriend to the family; an obnoxious co-worker (Ken Marino) catches Matt and Colleen canoodling at the office.

programme.title: Life in Pieces
programme.desc: When Chad is caught stealing Colleen's puppy, he uses the opportunity to pitch a new business venture; Heather tries to end things with her longtime hairstylist (Alex Borstein); Tim spoils Samantha's birthday party.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Louis takes the entire family to Taiwan to patch things up with Gene; Louis wonders if life in Orlando is as good as it could be in Taiwan; Jessica takes Eddie, Emery and Evan to her childhood locales.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: While showing Emery the ropes on his first day of middle school, Eddie reveals how he convinced the staff into believing fake Chinese customs that provide special privileges; Louis hires a housekeeper to help lighten Jessica's load at home.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry helps Bobbi's self-defense class; Lisa's lunch causes an uproar; Leung receives some mysterious packages.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry uses his interview at a rival school to try to get the phys-ed job; Robert believes an elaborate musical number will prove he has what it takes.

programme.desc: Jack joins the robotics club to Dre's dismay; Ruby helps Diane with her school project.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre spirals when Rainbow is elected to the prestigious California Board of Medicine, and the invitation for the annual fundraising gala is addressed to Dr. Rainbow Johnson and guest; Diane redecorates her room to impress Mason.

programme.title: The Fosters
programme.desc: Jude surprises Callie by throwing a house party to celebrate her 17th birthday; Brandon is suspicious of AJ's behavior; Callie and Mariana shop for a car without telling their mothers.

programme.desc: Paul discovers he has a lot in common with his new editor (Patrick Warburton); Paul forbids the girls inviting their boyfriends to Thanksgiving Day dinner.

programme.desc: Jude surprises Callie by throwing a house party to celebrate her 17th birthday; Brandon is suspicious of AJ's behavior; Callie and Mariana shop for a car without telling their mothers.

programme.title: Good Trouble
programme.desc: Mariana's stress hits a breaking point; Malika welcomes Isaac to the Coterie; Dennis reels after Ranjit's betrayal, leading Davia and Alice to put their heads together.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy and Kyle decide to have a home birth -- at Mike and Vanessa's; Ryan and Chuck team up to construct a state-of-the-art crib.

programme.desc: While Mike is away, Kristin learns what it takes to be in charge at Outdoor Man; Vanessa and Kyle debate how to upgrade the backyard play area and Ryan teaches Mandy how to play chess, but he may be the one getting schooled.

programme.desc: Jack joins the robotics club to Dre's dismay; Ruby helps Diane with her school project.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre spirals when Rainbow is elected to the prestigious California Board of Medicine, and the invitation for the annual fundraising gala is addressed to Dr. Rainbow Johnson and guest; Diane redecorates her room to impress Mason.

programme.title: Designed for Death
programme.desc: Obsessed with a handsome homeowner, a deranged interior decorator sets out to eliminate his family and live in the house she created for them.

programme.title: A Predator Returns
programme.desc: A teen takes matters into her own hands when a man who's posing as a shark researcher becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry gets involved in the student council election; Robert tries to end a smear campaign; Lisa doesn't get along with the school's librarian.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry wants to take Callaghan's daughter on a date; Bobbi leads a photo shoot for Xavier's campaign.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry has a hard time accepting a former student as an adult; Robert tries too hard to connect with a student; Bobbi tries to prove her femininity to Malik.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry raises money for a down payment to buy his rental; Robert's pride gets in the way; Lisa plans a farewell for the crossing guard.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is guilted into volunteering at Jack and Diane's school carnival; Rainbow makes an appointment for Junior to get his flu shot, but Ruby has strong opinions against modern medicine.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre knows when to choose his battles with Bow, but they disagree on where to send Devante to preschool; Junior helps Jack and Diane pull an eighth grade prank.

programme.title: grown-ish
programme.desc: Doug learns Bar None is being sold from under his feet, leading to conflict with his dad about his chosen career; Andre faces consequences with the Gammas over his business association with Brock; Zaara plans a summer trip.

programme.title: grown-ish
programme.desc: Aaron takes a leap of faith with Zoey; Andre is offered an assistant role by Rich Paul; Kiela finds herself at a crossroads for how to spend her summer.

programme.title: 8 Simple Rules
programme.desc: Paul searches for perfect Christmas gifts for his family; Cate's church asks her to sing a solo at midnight Mass.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don are forced to take sides in a feud when Andi and Marcy realize they were high school rivals.

programme.title: Life in Pieces
programme.desc: Greg and Jen interview nannies, but have a hard time finding one they trust; Heather thinks Matt used borrowed money to buy earrings for Colleen; the family has fun with a puppet John made for Lark.

programme.title: Life in Pieces
programme.desc: Everyone at Thanksgiving dinner has a bad reaction to Colleen's cauliflower dish; Sophia and Tim race to replace Heather's spoiled turkey; Greg and Jen try to choose Lark's godparent; Samantha sneaks into a corn maze with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: In the spirit of Halloween, Louis makes every effort to scare Jessica, who's busy drafting a horror novel; Eddie and his friends are excited to party at Nicole's house with some high school kids.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: The Cattleman's Ranch serves as the polling place for the 1996 presidential election; Jessica suspects one of the restaurant employees is an undocumented immigrant; Eddie and his friends debate about who killed a famous rapper.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry gets involved in the student council election; Robert tries to end a smear campaign; Lisa doesn't get along with the school's librarian.

programme.title: The Fosters
programme.desc: Mariana's biological grandfather informs her that she cannot be Isabella's godmother unless she is first baptized; Stef confronts Callie about her actions at her birthday party.

programme.desc: Paul searches for perfect Christmas gifts for his family; Cate's church asks her to sing a solo at midnight Mass.

programme.desc: Mariana's biological grandfather informs her that she cannot be Isabella's godmother unless she is first baptized; Stef confronts Callie about her actions at her birthday party.

programme.title: Good Trouble
programme.sub-title: With a Little Help From My Friends
programme.desc: It's opening night at Haven, and unexpected dinner guests lead to chaos in the kitchen; Malika braces herself to return to work after a setback; Evan surprises Mariana with a unique opportunity.

programme.desc: Doug learns Bar None is being sold from under his feet, leading to conflict with his dad about his chosen career; Andre faces consequences with the Gammas over his business association with Brock; Zaara plans a summer trip.

programme.desc: The Cattleman's Ranch serves as the polling place for the 1996 presidential election; Jessica suspects one of the restaurant employees is an undocumented immigrant; Eddie and his friends debate about who killed a famous rapper.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is guilted into volunteering at Jack and Diane's school carnival; Rainbow makes an appointment for Junior to get his flu shot, but Ruby has strong opinions against modern medicine.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre knows when to choose his battles with Bow, but they disagree on where to send Devante to preschool; Junior helps Jack and Diane pull an eighth grade prank.

programme.title: Caught in His Web
programme.desc: Three women's lives become a living nightmare when a mysterious cyberbully hacks into their cellphones and computers. With help from a detective, they join forces to track down the culprit and end the harassment once and for all.

programme.title: Deadly House Call
programme.desc: A busy working mother hires a nurse to care for her wealthy father, who has early onset dementia, but soon a bizarre deception creeps into play when the seductive nurse makes a play for the family fortune.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Francis visits the school which inspires Gerry in dealing with a student; Simon runs away; Trudy uncovers more of Malik's past.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerri has an encounter with a female police officer; Bobbi tries to end things with Robert; Simon believes he can protect Xavier using science.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: After a run-in with an old fling, Gerry is convinced her daughter is his; Robert gets ready for the 20th reunion of his chess club.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry goes to a teacher conference in Atlantic City to try to find a girl; Robert and Bobbi's fling goes public; Trudy and Frank argue about his inappropriate phone calls.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre realizes he needs to intervene when Pops starts gambling and partying to mask his heartbreak; Bow pawns school drop-off onto Junior so that she can avoid an annoying parent.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre underestimates Rhonda's ability to be a mom, and he struggles to support her decision to adopt a baby; Ruby gets in the way of Bow's plans for the perfect baby shower; Junior, Jack and Diane want to give the best gift of the party.

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Emma accidentally ruins Ben's stash of condoms, leading Ben, Tucker and Danny to fear that their girlfriends might be pregnant; they try to find out the truth while the girls fake symptoms to throw them into a panic.

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben tries to make things right with Emma after he forgets her birthday; Danny and Riley are offered new career opportunities; Brad returns home with a new outlook on life; Tucker has exciting news, but no one to share it with.

programme.title: 8 Simple Rules
programme.desc: Paul proudly permits Rory to go out on his first date, prompting the girls to accuse him of having a double-standard because they weren't allowed to date when they were 13.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to prove he isn't jealous after he discovers that Andi has a close male friend at work.

programme.title: Life in Pieces
programme.desc: A trip to the hospital leads to Jen and Greg having some rare quality time together; John, Samantha and Sophia go to a restaurant where everything is named after feelings; Heather gives Tim a sexy present.

programme.title: Life in Pieces
programme.desc: Greg and Matt resume a ping-pong game that was interrupted years earlier; Heather encourages Tim to get a vasectomy; Jen stresses about going back to work.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: When Louis and Jessica decide to open the restaurant on Thanksgiving Day, Emery and Evan start considering their future in the business; Jessica teaches Eddie about hard work.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Jessica is surprised when Evan decides to go to church on Sunday; Louis is treated to a free teeth-whitening session; Eddie and Emery find ways to eliminate the healthy cereal in the multi-pack.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Francis visits the school which inspires Gerry in dealing with a student; Simon runs away; Trudy uncovers more of Malik's past.

programme.title: Mr. D

programme.desc: Mariana and Evan butt heads over control of Spekulate; Gael welcomes a new studio tenant; Davia copes with her insecurities after a talented understudy joins the musical; Alice takes her new role seriously, while Malika seeks payback.

programme.title: Kalimera Ellada
programme.desc: I pio diahroniki kalimera tis ellinikis tileorasis gia 32 sinehomeni hronia.

programme.title: To Proino
programme.desc: Enimerosi me apopsi ke sighroni matia. O Giorgos Liagas ine edo me allon aera.

programme.title: Rouk Zouk
programme.desc: I Zeta Makripoulia ke to agapimeno mas paichnidi prosferi perissotero gelio apo pote!

programme.title: 5x5
programme.desc: Ikogeniako, diaskedastiko, gemato anatropes tilepechnidi me ton Marko Seferli.

programme.title: Canadian News
programme.desc: Coverage of current events.

programme.title: The 2night Show
programme.desc: The 2night Show.
